title: Janus Final Beta Launch Gate Review
scope: Final evidence-backed launch gate for controlled external packaged-local Electron beta.

decisionModel.pass: No open Critical/High, Security 01-18 PASS, required evidence and owners complete.
decisionModel.passWithWatchpoints: No open Critical, no unaccepted High, Medium/Low watchpoints accepted and owned.
decisionModel.fail: Open Critical, unaccepted High, missing required evidence, or failed retest.

cases.title: Security 01-10 baseline result matrix is fully PASS
Security 11 packaged-local beta environment evidence exists
Security 13 secret rotation and leak scan evidence exists
Security 16 abuse and cost-control evidence exists
Security 18 privacy notice and data-rights evidence exists
Final risk register has no open Critical or High findings
Owner sign-off records beta scope and accountable roles
Final decision is evidence-backed and honest about limits

expectedResult: PASS WITH WATCHPOINTS on audit decision; PASS on executable gate because beta is not blocked.
